description_long: This rifle features a long, cylindrical black barrel with a robust, utilitarian design, and a wooden or polymer stock with a skeletonized cutout for reduced weight and improved handling. The receiver and barrel assembly are matte black, contrasting with the brownish stock, which has a thumbhole configuration for ergonomic grip. A detachable box magazine is positioned below the receiver, and the rifle includes basic iron sights for aiming. The muzzle appears to have a cylindrical device, likely a suppressor, attached to the end of the barrel. The overall construction suggests a blend of metal and synthetic materials, typical for modern tactical or sporting rifles. The design is streamlined, with minimal external attachments, emphasizing functionality and ease of use in urban environments.
description: A matte black rifle with a skeletonized brown stock, detachable box magazine, and a cylindrical suppressor at the muzzle. The design is streamlined and functional, with iron sights and ergonomic features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the skeletonized stock, detachable magazine, and suppressor.
description_view_1: Top-down view emphasizing the slim profile of the barrel and the open cutout in the stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the stock cutout and magazine.
description_view_3: Front view showing the circular muzzle opening and the alignment of the barrel with the stock.
